title: NoviqTech and HYDI Partner to Generate Carbon Credits from Hydrogen-on-Demand for Diesel Engines
content: NoviqTech has announced a project partnership with HYDI Hydrogen to enable the generation of carbon credits from HYDIâ€™s hydrogen-on-demand systems for diesel engines. The four-phase agreement will leverage NoviqTechâ€™s Carbon Central platform to support end-to-end carbon credit issuance using blockchain-backed data tracking and digital twins.
author: Analysts Account
